plugins.prepareCmd: LDFLAGS="-s -w -X main.version=v${nextRelease.version}" && mkdir -p dist && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o dist/dictctl-linux-amd64 ./cmd/dictctl && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o dist/dictctl-linux-arm64 ./cmd/dictctl && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o dist/dictctl-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/dictctl && cd dist && sha256sum dictctl-* > checksums.txt
